name: Ravi Sharma
text: Got our modular kitchen done from VS Furnitures. Quality of ply and fittings is excellent. Soft-close shutters still working perfectly after 2 years. Highly recommend.

name: Priya Gupta
text: Needed a floor-to-ceiling wardrobe in our bedroom. They measured, suggested the best layout, and delivered on time. Very clean finish. Will use them again.

name: Amit Tiwari
text: We got our entire flat furnished — kitchen, two wardrobes, TV unit, and beds. One team handled everything. No hassle, no running around. Very satisfied.

name: Sunita Verma
text: Called them for polishing my old dining table and chairs. They came the same day and the result was amazing. Looks brand new. 10% off on first repair is a great offer.

name: Deepak Malviya
text: Got workstations and a reception counter made for my office on AB Road. Very professional work. They finished the whole thing in 12 days as promised.

name: Neha Chouhan
text: Best modular kitchen experience. They came for a free site visit, suggested a nice L-shaped layout for our small kitchen, and executed it perfectly. Very happy.

name: Rajesh Patel
text: Wanted a custom bookshelf with a study desk for my son's room. They made exactly what I described. Good wood quality and neat joinery. Will definitely call again.

name: Kavita Joshi
text: Got a complete bedroom set — wardrobe, bed with storage, and dressing table. All matching finish. They coordinated everything together so nicely.

name: Vikram Agarwal
text: Got false ceiling and wood paneling done for my living room. The room looks completely transformed. Clean work, no mess left behind.

name: Pooja Dubey
text: We shifted homes and needed all furniture dismantled and reassembled at the new place. They were on time, careful with everything, and put it all back perfectly.

name: Suresh Yadav
text: My grandfather's old wooden almirah was in bad shape. They restored it beautifully — repaired the joints, polished it, and it looks like an antique showpiece now.

name: Meera Soni
text: Third time using VS Furnitures. First my kitchen, then my sister's, and now my mother's. Every time the quality and service is the same — excellent.

name: Rohit Rathore
text: Got a custom TV unit and wall shelving made for my living room. Very different from the standard stuff you see. Exactly the design I wanted.

name: Shweta Mehta
text: Sliding wardrobe with mirror shutters — looks premium. The build quality is solid and the tracks are smooth. Very happy with the outcome.

name: Dinesh Sharma
text: Got wooden door frames for four rooms replaced. Precise fitting, good wood. They finished in two days without disturbing the rest of the house.

name: Rashmi Pathak
text: Dining chair joints were loose and one leg was cracked. They fixed everything in one visit. Very reasonable charges. Would recommend for any small repairs too.

name: Anil Kumar
text: U-shaped kitchen with tall units and a loft. The planning advice they gave was very practical. Materials used are of good quality. Overall great experience.

name: Sarita Trivedi
text: POP false ceiling with lighting cutouts in bedroom and living room. Very clean execution. The crew was disciplined and cleaned up everything before leaving.

name: Mohit Srivastava
text: Got 6 workstations and a conference table made for our small office. Everything built to size, within budget, and delivered before the deadline. Very professional.

name: Geeta Agrawal
text: Wanted a pooja mandir and a display unit for the hall. Both came out beautifully. The detailing on the mandir was especially nice. Very skilled craftsmen.

name: Sanjay Chouhan
text: New flat, full furnishing from scratch. Kitchen, wardrobes, beds, TV unit — everything from VS Furnitures. Took about 5 weeks total. Very happy with the end result.

name: Anita Bose
text: Had 3 old wooden chairs and a coffee table restored. The polish job is excellent. You cannot tell they are 15 years old. Great service at a fair price.

name: Prakash Dubey
text: Got beds with hydraulic storage for both bedrooms. Very well made. Kids can easily access the storage. Build quality is sturdy. No complaints at all.

name: Lalita Verma
text: The free site visit was very helpful. They suggested changes to my original plan that saved space and money. Kitchen turned out better than I imagined.

name: Hemant Jain
text: Entertainment unit with back-lit shelves and a side cabinet. Looks stunning in the evening. The backlit effect was their idea and it really elevates the room.

name: Puja Tiwari
text: Bought imported flatpack furniture from a store and had no idea how to assemble it. They put everything together perfectly in 3 hours. Very helpful.

name: Kamlesh Gupta
text: New construction — all wooden window frames and door frames by VS Furnitures. Measurements were perfect, fitting was solid. No gaps anywhere.

name: Rinku Yadav
text: Hinged 4-door wardrobe with internal fittings — drawers, shelves, and a pull-out shoe rack. Exactly what we asked for. Very satisfied.
